providers.label: macOS Keychain
ownerSetup: Create the real secret outside EtherealAI in macOS Keychain.
Record only the Keychain service/account label in EtherealAI.
Keep exchange withdrawal permissions disabled for future trading credentials.
readinessChecks: no secret-looking value is stored in SQLite

providers.label: 1Password
providers.referenceFormat: 1Password item or field reference name only
ownerSetup: Create the secret in 1Password outside EtherealAI.
Record only the vault/item/field label in EtherealAI.
Use a read-only or trading-limited exchange key with withdrawals disabled.
readinessChecks: no secret-looking value is stored in SQLite

providers.label: Environment Variable Name
ownerSetup: Set the real secret in the local shell or launch environment outside EtherealAI.
Record only the environment variable name in EtherealAI.
Keep environment files out of source control.
readinessChecks: environment variable name is syntactically safe
no secret-looking value is stored in SQLite
futureAdapterRequirements: variable presence check without logging value

providers.label: Local Vault Path
providers.referenceFormat: local encrypted vault path or item reference only
ownerSetup: Create the encrypted vault outside EtherealAI.
Record only the vault path or item reference in EtherealAI.
Confirm file permissions are owner-only before any future credential loader is implemented.
readinessChecks: path or item reference is local-only
no secret-looking value is stored in SQLite

providers.label: Other Local Reference
ownerSetup: Keep the real secret outside EtherealAI.
Record only a human-readable pointer to where the owner keeps the secret.
Replace this provider with a reviewed implementation before any live execution work.
readinessChecks: reference notes explain where the owner keeps the secret
no secret-looking value is stored in SQLite
